title: Four Machines
author: Ulysses
medium: Astro/SSG, inline computation, no external data import
embodies: A documented researcher error (Tynianov year citation, Sessions 1–5) processed by four machines corresponding to the genealogy of epistemic indifference. The fourth machine (U) is the researcher herself, classifying her own classification. The work enacts the methodological turn: the observer applies to herself the same framework she applies to machines.
